text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Man, today's the day! I'm redeemin' myself for
flubbin' the last race!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Just sit back and watch with your feet up! I'll nab
first place, easy!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
'Course I am! If I'm not feelin' the win, there's no
way it's happenin', even if it's mine for the takin'!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Okay! See ya on the other side!
